projects.title: Woody Encroachment and the Drying of Prairie Streams
projects.areaOfStudy: Area of Study - Flint Hills, Kansas, USA
projects.summary: Investigating how vegetation shifts—particularly woody encroachment—alter streamflow dynamics and water availability in Flint Hills grassland ecosystems, linking long-term hydrological patterns to prairie stream drying.
details: Graduate teaching and research at the Konza LTER landscape
Streamflow decline analysis in relation to woody encroachment

projects.title: Persimmon Creek Watershed Modeling
projects.summary: Applied OK.HAWQS (SWAT) and ArcGIS Pro to analyze land use and BMP scenarios for sediment, E. coli, and pollutant reduction—culminating in an EPA 9-element watershed-based plan for Oklahoma Conservation Commission.
details: Mapped riparian habitat using aerial imagery and ArcGIS Pro
Simulated BMP scenarios and conducted cost-benefit analysis
Submitted EPA 9-element Watershed-based Plan (Persimmon Creek, Woodward County)

projects.title: Petroleum Hydrocarbon Soil Remediation with Biosurfactants
projects.summary: Studied sophorolipids from Candida bombicola and synthetic surfactants for remediating aviation kerosene–contaminated soil—bridging laboratory characterization with field-relevant cleanup strategies.
details: Laboratory study on biosurfactant vs. synthetic surfactant removal efficiency
Presented at Remediation Technologies XXI and Tsinghua Environmental Remediation Forum

projects.title: Compost Biofilter for VOC Removal
projects.summary: Contributed to gas-phase toluene and xylene removal studies in compost biofilters, examining concentration and flow-rate effects on treatment performance.

projects.title: Acetoclastic Methanogenesis in Anaerobic Sludge
projects.summary: Prepared and monitored reactors to study acetoclastic methanogenic activity, including effects of UV-aged PET on methanogenesis—using GC-FID and GC-TCD for methane and nitrogen analysis.
details: Developed protocols for GC run experiments
Governor's Water Conference lightning talk on PET and methanogenesis

projects.title: Arsenic Tolerance in Rice Cultivars
projects.summary: Investigated biochemical and molecular aspects of arsenate-influenced seed germination, protein profiling, and plant stress responses—contributing to a handbook chapter on polyamines in abiotic stress.
details: Bradford assays, electrophoresis, and seedling extract analysis
Drafted bibliographic work for Handbook of Plant and Crop Physiology

projects.title: Ceramic Leaf Design for CO₂-to-Glucose
projects.institution: CSIR–Central Glass and Ceramic Research Institute
projects.summary: Literature review and conference support on ceramic biosurfaces for glucose preparation from CO₂, within DST-INSPIRE fellowship work on biomaterials.
details: Assisted organization of international conference on Biomaterials and Implants

projects.title: Litter Decomposition in Nagarahole Forest
projects.summary: MSc thesis on microflora-mediated wood and leaf litter decomposition in Rajiv Gandhi National Park (Nagarahole)—first class first in university for Environmental System Management.

projects.title: Antibiotic Stewardship One Health Project
projects.summary: WHO-aligned One Health field research with PhotoVoice and stakeholder interviews on antibiotic use in rural systems—synthesizing findings into policy briefs for national stewardship programs.
details: Qualitative interviews with human and veterinary healthcare providers

projects.title: Heavy Metal Contamination in Urban Playgrounds
projects.summary: Field and laboratory study of cadmium and toxic metals in Prague children's playgrounds—published via Arnika press release on soil contamination findings.

projects.title: Fly Ash Adsorption for Wastewater Treatment
projects.institution: Government College of Engineering and Ceramic Technology
projects.summary: Collected fly ash from thermal power plants, collated physicochemical data, and compared adsorption potential against prevalent wastewater treatment techniques.
